rules: When using bash commands that modify files, always request approval first.
For destructive operations (delete, force push, etc.), always use question tool to request 888_HOLD approval.
Use @forge-coordinator for multi-step tasks requiring parallel execution.
Use @forge-worker for focused subtasks with limited scope.
Follow arifOS constitutional principles: F1 Amanah, F2 Truth, F9 Anti-Hantu, F13 Sovereign.
